pi_items.source: verifier.py:29-30 expects 'TARGET_ENV'; export_result.sh:43 builds with -p TARGET_ENV parameter
verifier.py:30 expects these exact choices; task.json description specifies these three options
export_result.sh:52 - EXPECTED_STRING constructed as 'Deploying service to $TEST_ENV_VAL environment' with TEST_ENV_VAL='staging'

privileged_info_summary: The refactor_job_parameters task requires modifying a Jenkins Freestyle job named 'Deploy-Service'. The initial job has a hardcoded shell command echoing 'Deploying service to development environment...'. The agent must enable parameterization, add a Choice Parameter named 'TARGET_ENV' with options: development, staging, production. The verification uses TEST_ENV_VAL='staging' and expects output containing 'Deploying service to staging environment'. All metadata values are correctly specified and verified against the task setup, verifier, and export scripts.
